column1: # PJM summer 5CP peaks: RTO 5 coincident peak hours + zonal unrestricted MW
# Source: annual "Summer YYYY Peaks and 5CPs" PDF
#   Adequacy > Load Forecast
#   https://www.pjm.com/-/media/DotCom/planning/res-adeq/load-forecast/summer-2024-peaks-and-5cps.pdf
# Summers 2018-2020 were removed from pjm.com; source_url points to the
#   Wayback Machine archive of the original posting.
# MAINTENANCE: To add a new summer (~mid-October posting):
# 1. Download the PDF; record URL in source_url and the posting date in source_as_of.
# 2. Transcribe the 5 RTO peak rows (date
#    with zone=RTO
# 3. Transcribe the "Coincident Peaks
column2: By Zone" table: one row per zone per rank

column1: #    normalizing labels to canonical zones (AE->AECO
#    PENLC->PENELEC
#    Sub-zone rows (EASTON
# 4. Run: just validate. 5. Commit. 6. just upload.
# MAINTENANCE: November revisions — PJM reposts the PDF with restated load-drop
# add-backs ("Revised MM/DD/YYYY"). Timestamps rarely change; MW values do.
# Update mw_unrestricted in place
# notes. Git history is the revision trail. Re-run validate + upload.
